attributes.name: [Oracle WebLogic OTel] High JTA transaction error rate

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    total_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.total)),
    rollback_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.rolled_back)),
    abandon_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.abandoned))
  BY attributes.server
// Minimum traffic threshold to avoid false positives on idle servers
| WHERE total_rate > 0
| EVAL error_rate_pct = ROUND((rollback_rate + abandon_rate) / total_rate * 100.0, 2)
// Adjust error rate threshold based on business criticality
// 5% is a reasonable default for general-purpose applications
| WHERE error_rate_pct > 5.0
| SORT error_rate_pct DESC
